untranslatable_reason: This signal requires multi-series correlation analysis and divergence detection across 6 pairs of time series. The allowed indicator set does not include: (1) correlation coefficients between multiple time series, (2) divergence measurement operators that compare direction alignment across multiple pairs, (3) threshold logic for 'at least 30% of pairs show divergence'. The signal logic 'Primary index and secondary index move in opposite directions' requires tracking paired series relationships that cannot be expressed with single-indicator comparisons. A custom multi-series divergence indicator would be needed.
translation_notes: ARONSON_DRY_0_2 is a sophisticated multi-series momentum divergence signal based on Hussman's work. It requires comparison of directional alignment across multiple index pairs (e.g., stock indices, sector pairs, asset class pairs) over rolling windows. This cannot be translated into the available indicator set which is limited to single-series technical indicators. Implementation would require: (1) external multi-series correlation engine, (2) custom divergence detector function, or (3) pre-computed divergence score indicator added to the allowed set.
